title: dispatch prepare native-override branch + honest economics (D1/D5/D7)
action: Per D1/D5/D7: when the resolved route is {type:'native'} AND the stored classification is native_model_override, emit spawn_agent payload {agent_type, message:'[bee-tier: <t>]\n...', model, reasoning_effort, fork_turns:'none'} (marker anchor unchanged per D5), channel stays 'codex-native' with transport:'native-override' field; deriveEconomics gains effective_model_status 'requested-accepted' with effective_model null. When route native but classification lower: with explicit fallback -> cli payload + recorded reason; without -> typed refusal {type:'refused', reason:'native_unavailable', detail:<classification>}; never silent. Golden budget-only payload rows stay byte-identical. Stale comment at dispatch-prepare.mjs:202-205 rewritten to the verified truth (fields exist upstream, schema-hidden by default). DECISION D3a COUPLING (binding, decision c0cba64e): when readNativeTransportClassification returns external_cli_only, prepare may route to CLI ONLY when the slot actually carries a configured cli command (standalone {kind:'cli'} slot or a composite's fallback leg — the explicit-only policy still applies to the composite); a bare native or null slot under external_cli_only returns a typed no-route refusal naming the missing cli config — never an invented command, never silent budget fallback.

truths: budget-only path payload byte-identical to today
no code path writes 'used-and-confirmed' or a non-null effective_model
refusal names the classification that blocked it
artifacts: golden payload rows for all three outcomes (native, fallback, refusal)

trace.outcome: prepareDispatch gains a resolved.type==='native' branch (D1/D5/D7): confirmed native_model_override emits spawn_agent{model,reasoning_effort,fork_turns:'none'} with economics.effective_model_status='native-requested' (R5) and transport:'native-override'; unconfirmed+explicit-only-fallback routes to cli + recorded reason; unconfirmed+no-fallback returns typed {reason:'native_unavailable',detail:<classification>} refusal, never silent (D1/D3a). classification is caller-injected via bee.mjs's handleDispatchPrepare (readNativeTransportClassification) so dispatch-prepare.mjs never imports across bin/lib. dispatch-guard.mjs gains a codex-branch-only marker regex accepting 'advisor' (claude branch untouched, R1) plus a golden row proving a confirmed native advisor payload passes evaluateDispatch. Stale spawn_agent-has-no-model-field comment rewritten.
deviations: Auto-add (rule 2, missing critical functionality): cnt-3's action text framed the marker-constant advisor acceptance as R1's cnt-4 responsibility, but cnt-4's actual landed cell action (guard route-check for override spawn fields, D6) never touches the marker regex at all, and cnt-4 depends on cnt-3 (not the reverse) — so without cnt-3 adding a codex-branch-only ANCHORED_CODEX_TIER_MARKER_RE accepting 'advisor', cnt-3's own R1 golden row (advisor native payload must pass evaluateDispatch) could never pass. Implemented within dispatch-guard.mjs (already in cnt-3's files list); claude branch regex left byte-unchanged per R1.

Auto-add (rule 2, missing critical functionality / layering): prepareDispatch cannot import readNativeTransportClassification directly (it lives in bee.mjs, the bin layer; dispatch-prepare.mjs is lib -- importing it there would invert the repo's bin->lib direction and, moreover, is untestable in this environment since no real host classifies as native_model_override on codex-cli 0.144.4, E3). Resolved via dependency injection: prepareDispatch gained a classification parameter, and bee.mjs's handleDispatchPrepare (not listed in cnt-3's files, but the only production call site) now reads the reader itself and passes the string through. Mirrored to .bee/bin/bee.mjs (byte-identical, confirmed via diff).

Auto-fix (rule 1, bug in touched code): deriveEconomics's codex-native branch unconditionally reported enforcement:'prompt-budget' and effective_model_status:'inherited-or-unknown' -- correct for a budget-only spawn but dishonest for a confirmed native-override spawn, which now carries a real structural model field on the payload. Extended deriveEconomics with a nativeConfirmed flag (defaults false, so every existing caller/test is byte-identical) producing enforcement:'native-model-param' and effective_model_status:'native-requested' (R5) only when channel==='codex-native' AND resolved.type==='native' AND nativeConfirmed===true.

Auto-fix (rule 1, stale comment in touched code): dispatch-prepare.mjs's slotForKind comment ('an advisor-kind payload is therefore not expected to pass the guard's marker branches') was rewritten -- it is now accurate only for the claude branch; the codex branch's ANCHORED_CODEX_TIER_MARKER_RE does recognize advisor and a confirmed-native codex advisor payload is expected to pass evaluateDispatch (this cell's own golden row proves it).

Hygiene byproduct, not part of cnt-3's own scope: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs was run because (a) it was required for my own bee.mjs/dispatch-guard.mjs/dispatch-prepare.mjs edits to reach the committed .claude-plugin/.codex-plugin trees, and (b) running it surfaced PRE-EXISTING drift from cnt-1/cnt-2 (skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs, scripts/onboard_bee.mjs, scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs, templates/tests/test_lib.mjs were already un-rendered into the committed plugin trees before this cell started -- confirmed via node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check showing MISMATCH on files this cell never touched). Regenerating the plugin trees was mechanical (via the repo's own renderer, no hand-editing) and necessary for node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs's byte-equality checks to pass. It also exposed a release-manifest sha256 mismatch (scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check now reports 26 changed files) which this cell's own dispatch explicitly assigns to the slice-closing cell ('Do NOT regen the release manifest (slice-close obligation, owned by the last cell)') -- left unregenerated on purpose, reported here rather than silently absorbed or silently left unmentioned.
trace.verify_output: test_dispatch_prepare.mjs: ALL PASS (25 passed, 0 failed), exit 0. test_lib_mirror.mjs: templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib byte-identical (21 files); runtime-derived hook inventory byte-identical (10 files); exit 0.
